arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: وَالطُّورِ
english translation text:
By the Mount [Sinai],
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: وَكِتَابٍ مَّسْطُورٍ
english translation text:
by the Book inscribed
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: فِي رَقٍّ مَّنشُورٍ
english translation text:
on an unrolled parchment;
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: وَالْبَيْتِ الْمَعْمُورِ
english translation text:
by the House greatly frequented;
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: وَالسَّقْفِ الْمَرْفُوعِ
english translation text:
by the vault raised high,
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: وَالْبَحْرِ الْمَسْجُورِ
english translation text:
by the surging sea:
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: إِنَّ عَذَابَ رَبِّكَ لَوَاقِعٌ
english translation text:
indeed your Lord’s punishment will surely befall.
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: مَّا لَهُ مِن دَافِعٍ
english translation text:
There is none who can avert it.
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: يَوْمَ تَمُورُ السَّمَاءُ مَوْرًا
english translation text:
On the day when the sky whirls violently,
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: وَتَسِيرُ الْجِبَالُ سَيْرًا
english translation text:
and the mountains move with an awful motion:
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: فَوَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
english translation text:
woe to the deniers on that day
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: الَّذِينَ هُمْ فِي خَوْضٍ يَلْعَبُونَ
english translation text:
—those who play around in vain talk,
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: يَوْمَ يُدَعُّونَ إِلَىٰ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ دَعًّا
english translation text:
the day when they will be shoved forcibly toward the fire of hell, [and told:]
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: هَٰذِهِ النَّارُ الَّتِي كُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
english translation text:
‘This is the Fire which you used to deny!
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: أَفَسِحْرٌ هَٰذَا أَمْ أَنتُمْ لَا تُبْصِرُونَ
english translation text:
Is this, then, [also] magic, or is it you who do not perceive?
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: اصْلَوْهَا فَاصْبِرُوا أَوْ لَا تَصْبِرُوا سَوَاءٌ عَلَيْكُمْ ۖ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
english translation text:
Enter it, and it will be the same for you whether you are patient or impatient. You are only being requited for what you used to do.’
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: إِنَّ الْمُتَّقِينَ فِي جَنَّاتٍ وَنَعِيمٍ
english translation text:
Indeed the Godwary will be amid gardens and bliss,
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: فَاكِهِينَ بِمَا آتَاهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ وَوَقَاهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ عَذَابَ الْجَحِيمِ
english translation text:
rejoicing because of what their Lord has given them, and that their Lord has saved them from the punishment of hell.
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: كُلُوا وَاشْرَبُوا هَنِيئًا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
english translation text:
[They will be told:] ‘Enjoy your food and drink, [as a reward] for what you used to do.’
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: مُتَّكِئِينَ عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مَّصْفُوفَةٍ ۖ وَزَوَّجْنَاهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٍ
english translation text:
They will be reclining on arrayed couches, and We will wed them to big-eyed houris.
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: وَالَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَاتَّبَعَتْهُمْ ذُرِّيَّتُهُم بِإِيمَانٍ أَلْحَقْنَا بِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ وَمَا أَلَتْنَاهُم مِّنْ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَيْءٍ ۚ كُلُّ امْرِئٍ بِمَا كَسَبَ رَهِينٌ
english translation text:
The faithful and their descendants who followed them in faith—We will make their descendants join them, and We will not stint anything from [the reward of] their deeds. Every person is hostage to what he has earned.
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: وَأَمْدَدْنَاهُم بِفَاكِهَةٍ وَلَحْمٍ مِّمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ
english translation text:
We will provide them with fruits and meat, such as they desire.
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: يَتَنَازَعُونَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا لَّا لَغْوٌ فِيهَا وَلَا تَأْثِيمٌ
english translation text:
There they will pass from hand to hand a cup wherein there will be neither any vain talk nor sinful speech.
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ غِلْمَانٌ لَّهُمْ كَأَنَّهُمْ لُؤْلُؤٌ مَّكْنُونٌ
english translation text:
They will be waited upon by their youths, as if they were guarded pearls.
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: وَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ يَتَسَاءَلُونَ
english translation text:
They will turn to one another, questioning each other.
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: قَالُوا إِنَّا كُنَّا قَبْلُ فِي أَهْلِنَا مُشْفِقِينَ
english translation text:
They will say, ‘Indeed, aforetime, we used to be apprehensive about our families.
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: فَمَنَّ اللَّهُ عَلَيْنَا وَوَقَانَا عَذَابَ السَّمُومِ
english translation text:
But Allah showed us favour and He saved us from the punishment of the [infernal] miasma.
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِن قَبْلُ نَدْعُوهُ ۖ إِنَّهُ هُوَ الْبَرُّ الرَّحِيمُ
english translation text:
We used to supplicate Him aforetime. Indeed He is the All-benign, the All-merciful.’
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: فَذَكِّرْ فَمَا أَنتَ بِنِعْمَتِ رَبِّكَ بِكَاهِنٍ وَلَا مَجْنُونٍ
english translation text:
So admonish. By your Lord’s blessing, you are not a soothsayer, nor mad.
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ شَاعِرٌ نَّتَرَبَّصُ بِهِ رَيْبَ الْمَنُونِ
english translation text:
Do they say, ‘[He is] a poet, for whom we await a fatal accident’?
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: قُلْ تَرَبَّصُوا فَإِنِّي مَعَكُم مِّنَ الْمُتَرَبِّصِينَ
english translation text:
Say, ‘Wait! I too am waiting along with you.’
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: أَمْ تَأْمُرُهُمْ أَحْلَامُهُم بِهَٰذَا ۚ أَمْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ
english translation text:
Is it their intellect which prompts them to [say] this, or are they a rebellious lot?
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ تَقَوَّلَهُ ۚ بَل لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
english translation text:
Do they say, ‘He has improvised it [himself]?’ Rather, they have no faith!
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: فَلْيَأْتُوا بِحَدِيثٍ مِّثْلِهِ إِن كَانُوا صَادِقِينَ
english translation text:
Let them bring a discourse like it, if they are truthful.
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: أَمْ خُلِقُوا مِنْ غَيْرِ شَيْءٍ أَمْ هُمُ الْخَالِقُونَ
english translation text:
Were they created from nothing? Or are they [their own] creators?
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: أَمْ خَلَقُوا السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ ۚ بَل لَّا يُوقِنُونَ
english translation text:
Did they create the heavens and the earth? Rather, they have no certainty!
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَائِنُ رَبِّكَ أَمْ هُمُ الْمُصَيْطِرُونَ
english translation text:
Do they possess the treasuries of your Lord? Or do they control [them]?
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: أَمْ لَهُمْ سُلَّمٌ يَسْتَمِعُونَ فِيهِ ۖ فَلْيَأْتِ مُسْتَمِعُهُم بِسُلْطَانٍ مُّبِينٍ
english translation text:
Do they have a ladder [leading up to heaven] whereby they eavesdrop? If so, let their eavesdropper produce a manifest authority.
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: أَمْ لَهُ الْبَنَاتُ وَلَكُمُ الْبَنُونَ
english translation text:
Does He have daughters while you have sons?
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: أَمْ تَسْأَلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ
english translation text:
Do you ask them for a reward, so that they are [wary of] being weighed down with debt?
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: أَمْ عِندَهُمُ الْغَيْبُ فَهُمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
english translation text:
Do they have [access to] the Unseen, which they write down?
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: أَمْ يُرِيدُونَ كَيْدًا ۖ فَالَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا هُمُ الْمَكِيدُونَ
english translation text:
Do they seek to outmaneuver [Allah]? But it is the faithless who are the outmaneuvered ones!
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: أَمْ لَهُمْ إِلَٰهٌ غَيْرُ اللَّهِ ۚ سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
english translation text:
Do they have any god other than Allah? Clear is Allah of any partners that they may ascribe [to Him]!
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: وَإِن يَرَوْا كِسْفًا مِّنَ السَّمَاءِ سَاقِطًا يَقُولُوا سَحَابٌ مَّرْكُومٌ
english translation text:
Were they to see a fragment falling from the sky, they would say, ‘A cumulous cloud.’
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: فَذَرْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ يُلَاقُوا يَوْمَهُمُ الَّذِي فِيهِ يُصْعَقُونَ
english translation text:
So leave them until they encounter the day when they will be thunderstruck,
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِي عَنْهُمْ كَيْدُهُمْ شَيْئًا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
english translation text:
the day when their guile will not avail them in any way, nor will they be helped.
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: وَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا عَذَابًا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
english translation text:
Indeed there is a punishment besides that for those who do wrong, but most of them do not know.
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: وَاصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ فَإِنَّكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا ۖ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ
english translation text:
So submit patiently to the judgement of your Lord, for indeed you fare before Our eyes. And celebrate the praise of your Lord when you rise [at dawn],
At Tur – The Mount

arabic text: وَمِنَ اللَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَإِدْبَارَ النُّجُومِ
english translation text:
and also glorify Him during the night and at the receding of the stars.
At Tur – The Mount
